description_en: Minneapolis may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 9 halal restaurants and 12 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Minneapolis, the United States, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Minneapolis: 26 halal restaurants listed, 12 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
